# Unitree G1 reference meshes

Source: `unitreerobotics/kinect_teleoperate`, `src/unitree_g1`.

- Upstream repository: https://github.com/unitreerobotics/kinect_teleoperate
- Upstream model: Unitree G1 MuJoCo XML and STL meshes
- License: BSD-3-Clause, retained in `LICENSE`
- Pinned upstream commit: `c520506d44dceeea3391b924fe1876d092a42e22`.
- The local snapshot contains the 41 STL files referenced by `g1.xml`, including both official dexterous hands.
- Mesh data was downloaded from the pinned upstream revision on 2026-07-10.

The application exports a derived GLB with neutral silver/black materials, a custom open U-shaped sensor helmet, and provider identity applied only through the runtime chest nameplate.
